item.title: Nice, made me smile
item.description: ?Jamie, who has cerebral palsy has been the Greenwood high school football team janitor since 2019. He always wanted to play sports growing up, but he couldn?t, so their state winning championship football program awarded him a ring? (originally posted by @SCARCENEWZ on 2021-02-06 06:43:49)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Deer are pretty neat
item.description:
Today I want to tell you about Deer. They are actually more interesting than you might think. Here's Dylan posing for the camera to get us started.
Before we begin, I want to dispel one common myth. People say Deer constantly get their antlers and heads caught up in things. It's completely not true. So this post doesn't get derailed I will try not mention to it again.
Deer eyes are on the side of their heads giving them 310 degrees of vision. Drumstick here using that advantage and is inspecting a light fitting. It is definitely not stuck.
Donut here absolutely did not crash into a bird and get it stuck on his antlers. He is merely trying a new hat. Donut has made sure to keep his nose clear as deer often lick their noses to improve their sense of smell.
In winter Deer are less active to conserve energy. In the spring they explore further and will often come into contact with humans. Dominic is going for a walk around the neighbourhood. There is nothing stuck in Dominic's antlers. Nothing at all.
Almost all species of Deer have antlers. Dan here is helping a local move their basketball hoop. The only Deer that does not is the Chinese water deer.
Dylan here is playing ball. Anyone who might say it's stuck is telling a lie. Because Dylan is male he's called a buck. A lady deer is called a Doe.
Diamond is shy. That's why he is covering his face. It's common though as Deer are prey animals and are easily startled. As a result new born Deer have no scent to make them harder to find by predators.
Reindeer are the only female deer which grow antlers. However all Deer love Christmas. Dixie here is helping put up lights.
Dotty here is sad he lost his spots. When Deer are born they have white spots which disappear as they grow older. It helps them hide. Since losing his spots Dotty has chosen this headwear instead. He likes to look his best.
During the mating season bucks will use their antlers to fight to get a lady. Sometimes they cheat and add extra armour like Duke has done here.
Almost all deer are shades of light to medium brown. Some deer however find this a bit boring. Destiny here has added some colour to his headwear. It's not stuck, it's just how he likes it.
Deer eat grasses, leaves, shoots and woody plants. Dreamer here is using his antlers to get his dinner just the way he likes it. A large deer eats around 2KG a day.
All deer have a rather fancy four chamber stomach that allows them to chew, regurgitate and chew again. Making food easier to digest. Some deer however are more interested in fashion than food. Dumpling is trying on a new earring. Looks pretty good I think.
Donut's wife is pregnant so he is bringing her a gift. The length of a pregnancy various according to the type of deer being between 180 and 240 days. Deer in tropical climates breed all year round.
Deer have great eyesight and are mostly active at night and early in the morning. Dixie here is just finishing his chores before he goes out to search for food. Dixie is simply moving the bucket and it is in no way stuck.
The largest deer species was the now extinct Irish Giant Deer. They reached 7 ft tall and definitely did not get their antlers stuck in anything. Doozy here hasn't either. He has simply made a small basket to carry his lunch around in.
A deer can live up to 25 years however in the wild they generally do not live anywhere near as long. As a result they take Christmas celebrations very seriously. Daffy here is getting to be an expert at helping with the lights.
This is Diana. She has absolutely nothing stuck in her antlers. Because she is a female she doesn't have antlers but that is beside the point.
A group of deer has a leader. Daffodil here is the leader of his herd. He has a busy job as the heard can have thousands of members. Daffodil added the plants to people know he's the boss. It was totally intentional.
Diablo prefers to stay out of the way. He has hidden himself and is communicating by scent. Deer can tell others about sex, social status and physique using scent glands.
Dimpes here has lost his testicles. It has causes his antlers to stop shedding and become very light and weak. He can however still help with decorations. Only the most festive Deer get promoted to reindeer which is why they work so hard at putting up decorations.
Dobby is a bit embarrassed. He just made himself ejaculate by rubbing his antlers against the grass. We'd better move on.
The tissues present in the antlers of deer grow faster than any other tissues on the planet so they can get a little itchy sometimes. Ducky is just having a quick scratch, that's all.
Like all deer, Domino is colour blind to neon orange. That's why he has picked blue again this year.
Dusty here had to jump high to get this red hat. It wasn't hard for him as most deer can jump up to eight feet high. They can also swim really well too.
Every year antlers fall off and regrow. When they regrow they are covered in a furry coat called velvet. It is rich in nerves and blood vessels It also looks pretty fancy until the point it sheds. Dougle has only just got his antlers back and is making the most of it with a quick game of ball.
I hope with this post I have dispelled any silly myths about them getting stuff stuck in their antlers. As you can see it almost never happens. I think Deer are pretty neat!
item.dc:creator: jonjohnjonjohn

item.description: I’m just frustrated with how deep racism is engrained in US politics. Just needed to vent into the void. Also most kids responded really well to it.
item.dc:creator: Sponger004

item.title: I live in Japan and got COVID. This is the care package that the government sent me.
item.description: This is for 1 person - my wife got another set just like this. Includes: Ramen Coffee Vegetable juice Jello with fruit in it Snacks Dehydrated seaweed salad + dressing Spaghetti Packets of meat sauce Packets of carbonara sauce Congee Cooked rice Cookies Caramel popcorn snacks Sports drinks Mixed bean packets Mackerel packets Sardine packets Japanese curry Some precooked meals to put on rice Canned fruit Canned tuna Water COVID sucks but at least I'll eat well! Love being in Japan!
item.dc:creator: CptGuano

item.title: Regarding Cash & Titties￼
item.description: #bbqsauceonmytitties #hooray_for_boobies #shut_up_and_take_my_money #bigdemontitseconomics FP Edit: Hey thanks guys & girls! I hope you had a laugh. Please donate a dollar somewhere for breast cancer. Hooray for boobies! Also, any single girls who want to say hi, I have tons of cat pictures and art, and I'd love to flirt with memes.

item.title: Day 253: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: White Truffle & Pecorino Black Angus Beef Patty, Pecorino Cheese, Arugula, Fig Jam, White Truffle, And Garlic Mayo From Big Orange In North Little Rock, Arkansas Thank You @ShouldWeTellHim For This Burger Submission 12/10 I Want This Previous Day 252: https://imgur.com/gallery/rYWaywS MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: My son hears my voice clearly for the first time with his new hearing aids
item.description: This video is my Son geting his hearing aids for the first time when he was 2 months old. He is currently 8 months now. I thought it was cute when he heard my voice, so I wanted to share with you guys.

item.title: Images of Note: you seem very friendly
item.description: Discord: https://discord.gg/RCrcZzA Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Streaming Fri, Sat, and Sun after 7PM UK time. What's up fuckers, remember when I said I was going to try keep a city going for three days? Well guess what, I accidentally deleted the save file because I am a moron. So yeah, fuck it, new city time. Try keep it alive for as long as I can.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Woops
item.description:
FP Edit: I haven't painted for 10+ years, since I was in high school art class. And back then I still wasn't good! Accepting constructive feedback as well! :)
I laugh everytime I see it
item.dc:creator: oldfishnewfish

item.title: Amazing Places Around the Earth
item.description:
1. Tianzi Mountains, China
2. Fly Geyser, Nevada, USA
3. Glowworms Cave, New Zealand
4. Pamukkale, Turkey
5. Emerald Ice On Baikal Lake, Russia
6. Monte Roraima, Venezuela
7. Zhangye Danxia Landform In Gansu, China
8. Son Doong Cave, Vietnam
9. Dragonblood Trees, Socotra, Yemen
10. Giants Causeway, Northern Ireland
11. Grand Prismatic Spring, Wyoming, USA
12. Glowing Beach, Maldives
13. Cave In Algarve, Portugal
14. Antelope Canyon, USA
15. Naica Mine, Mexico
16. Red Beach, Panjin, China
17. Salar De Uyuni, Bolivia
18. Abraham Lake, Canada
19. Dallol Volcano, Ethiopia
20. Painted Dunes, Lassen Volcanic National Park, USA Painted like nipples.
21. Namib Desert, Namibia  Looks like a painting, but it’s not. It's probably a lil touched up like most of these tho. It was in National Geographic though.
22. Ice Cave Near The Mutnovsky Volcano, Russia
23. Lake Retba, Senegal  The pink color is due to industrial runoff from the Pepto Bismol manufacturing plant nearby
24. Ice Cave In Iceland Guys, we did it. We finally found the samsquanch.
25. Spotted Lake, Canada
26. Gates To Hell, Derweze, Turkmenistan AKA Satan's Anus
27. Lake Natron, Tanzania
28. Lake Hillier, Australia There's another manufacturing plant just to the left of this picture. Pepto Bismol is destroying our planet
29. Ice Cave, Oregon, USA
30. Skaftafell Glacier, Iceland
item.dc:creator: TheCouncilofRicks
